description_long: This is a large, industrial-style oven with a heavily weathered and rusted metallic exterior, suggesting long-term use or exposure to harsh conditions. The front features a wide oven door with a rectangular window, several control knobs, and a visible brand plate. The cooktop has eight circular burners arranged in two rows, each with a corresponding control knob below. The sides and back are also covered in rust patches and grime, giving the oven a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The control panel is raised at the back, with a row of knobs and a small vent or grille above the burners. The overall construction is robust, with thick metal panels and a solid, boxy form.
description: A large, rusted industrial oven with eight burners, a front windowed door, and a row of control knobs. The exterior is heavily weathered metal with visible grime and corrosion.
description_view_0: The back of the oven, showing a solid, rusted metal panel with some grime and corrosion, and the raised control panel at the top.
description_view_1: The left side of the oven, highlighting extensive rust and grime, as well as the cooktop with eight burners visible from above.
description_view_2: The front of the oven, featuring the main door with a window, a row of control knobs, a brand plate, and the cooktop with all burners visible.
description_view_3: The right side of the oven, similar to the left, with visible rust and the cooktop's burners seen from above.
attribute_control_panel_design: The control panel is a raised horizontal strip at the back of the cooktop, featuring a row of eight round knobs aligned with the burners. Above the knobs, there is a small rectangular vent or grille. The panel is metallic and matches the oven's weathered finish, with no visible digital displays or touchscreens.
attribute_door_handle_type: The oven door handle is a horizontal, protruding bar mounted across the upper section of the door. It appears to be made of metal, matching the oven's finish, and is robust with a simple, utilitarian design and no decorative features.
attribute_window_presence: present; a rectangular window is set into the oven door, centrally placed and of moderate size, allowing a view into the oven interior.
attribute_brand_logo: VIKING logo visible; located on the lower left of the oven door, the logo is metallic and rectangular, embossed with the brand name.
attribute_ventilation_features: A small rectangular vent or grille is present above the control knobs on the raised control panel at the back of the cooktop.
